0001.title: Acme Corp Employee Handbook
0001.own_text:
Welcome to Acme Corp. This handbook explains the policies that apply to all
full-time employees. Keep it handy — it is the source of truth for how we work.

0002.title: 1. Working Hours and Remote Work
0002.own_text: This section covers when and where you are expected to work.
0002.summary: This section covers when and where you are expected to work.

0003.title: 1.1 Core Hours
0003.own_text:
Standard working hours are 9:00 to 17:00, Monday to Friday. Core hours during
which all employees must be reachable are 10:00 to 16:00. Outside core hours you
may flex your start and end times by up to two hours.
0003.summary: Standard working hours are 9:00 to 17:00, Monday to Friday.

0004.title: 1.2 Remote Work Policy
0004.own_text:
Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week. Working remotely for more
than 3 days per week requires written approval from your manager. Fully remote
arrangements are decided case by case and must be renewed every 12 months.
0004.summary: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week.

0005.title: 2. Leave and Time Off
0005.own_text: Acme offers several distinct categories of leave. Each has its own allowance.
0005.summary: Acme offers several distinct categories of leave.

0006.title: 2.1 Annual Leave
0006.own_text:
Every full-time employee is entitled to 25 days of paid annual leave per
calendar year, in addition to public holidays. Up to 5 unused annual leave days
may be carried over into the following year.
0006.summary: Every full-time employee is entitled to 25 days of paid annual leave per calendar year, in addition to public holidays.

0007.title: 2.2 Sick Leave
0007.own_text:
Employees receive 10 paid sick days per year. A doctor's note is required for
any sick absence longer than 3 consecutive days. Unused paid sick days do not
carry over and are not paid out on departure.
0007.summary: Employees receive 10 paid sick days per year.

0008.title: 2.3 Parental Leave
0008.own_text:
New parents are entitled to 16 weeks of paid parental leave, which may be taken
any time within the first 12 months after birth or adoption. Parental leave is
separate from, and does not reduce, your annual leave allowance.
0008.summary: New parents are entitled to 16 weeks of paid parental leave, which may be taken any time within the first 12 months after birth or adoption.

0009.title: 3. Compensation and Benefits
0009.own_text: This section describes how and when you are paid, and your benefits.
0009.summary: This section describes how and when you are paid, and your benefits.

0010.title: 3.1 Salary and Payroll
0010.own_text:
Salaries are paid monthly, on the last working day of each month. Payslips are
available in the employee portal. Overtime is not paid for salaried roles but is
compensated with time off in lieu.
0010.summary: Salaries are paid monthly, on the last working day of each month.

0011.title: 3.2 Health Insurance
0011.own_text:
Acme covers 100% of the premium for employee health insurance and 50% of the
premium for dependents. Coverage begins on your first day of employment.
0011.summary: Acme covers 100% of the premium for employee health insurance and 50% of the premium for dependents.

0012.title: 3.3 Retirement Plan
0012.own_text:
Acme matches employee retirement contributions up to 6% of base salary.
Contributions vest after two years of continuous service.
0012.summary: Acme matches employee retirement contributions up to 6% of base salary.

0013.title: 4. Code of Conduct
0013.own_text: All employees are expected to uphold the following standards.
0013.summary: All employees are expected to uphold the following standards.

0014.title: 4.1 Confidentiality
0014.own_text:
Confidential information must not be shared outside the company. This obligation
continues for 2 years after your employment ends.
0014.summary: Confidential information must not be shared outside the company.

0015.title: 4.2 Expense Policy
0015.own_text:
Business expenses must be submitted within 30 days with a valid receipt.
Expenses over 200 USD require pre-approval from your manager.
0015.summary: Business expenses must be submitted within 30 days with a valid receipt.
